2026-04-29CIRCBritish Columbia Treaty Commission ActAppointment of the Chief Commissioner of the British Columbia Treaty CommissionAppointment of George Abbott of Victoria, British Columbia, to be Chief Commissioner of the British Columbia Treaty Commission, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Chief Commissioner of the British Columbia Treaty Commission
precis: Appointment of George Abbott of Victoria, British Columbia, to be Chief Commissioner of the British Columbia Treaty Commission, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.
